name: Chefi la cuțite
overview: The show is the Romanian version  of  "Game of Chefs", a competition open for both amateur and professional chefs, competing for the title of "Romania's most talented chef". The show has four stages: The blind auditions, training camp, kitchen battles, and finals.

trailers.title: "O să fie spectacol!" Premiera Chefi la cuțite. 4, 5, 6 și 7 septembrie la Antena1 și AntenaPLAY
